calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Defendant Robert F. Knoxs Anti-Slapp Motion And Motion Made Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ray Shahani, Esq. 650-348-1444 rks@attycubed.com for Plaintiff.
Reed Harvey, Esq. rehlawoffice@gmail.com for Defendant Robert Knox who is also present.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Shahani reports they have worked out terms and withdraws his contest email. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ROBERT KNOX's Anti-Slapp Motion Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Knox's anti-SLAPP motion to strike is granted. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Off Calendar May-01-2020 Continued To Aug-26-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
